results.title: Elon Musk’s Plan ForAINews|Commentary- Yahoo News Singapore
results.body: Effectively, his plan is to useAIto combine breakingnewsand socialcommentaryaround big stories, present the compilation live and allow you to go deeper via chat. “As more information becomes available, thenewssummary willupdateto include that information,” Musk told me.
